name: Takuji
message: "What... What did you just do to me?!"

name: Ayana
message: "I didn't do anything. I just watched."

name: Takuji
message: "You did something!"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehe, you just got caught up in your delusions. I didn't do anything."

name: Takuji
message: "What did you say?! There's no way that was a delusion! If I had such a realistic delusion like that, I wouldn't... I wouldn't even be able to tell the difference between reality and my delusions!"

name: Takuji
message: "That's right! I definitely felt the warmth of your skin! That couldn't have been an illusion!"

name: Ayana
message: "Warmth..."

name: Ayana
message: "How nasty."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What are you saying?!"

name: Takuji
message: "You're just some perverted futanari girl! You came everywhere!"

name: Ayana
message: "Like I said, I'm not a futanari."

name: Takuji
message: "No, I'll prove you're a futanari!"
I shoved my hand up Otonashi's skirt and touched her crotch.

name: Takuji
message: "Look. I knew it."

name: Takuji
message: "...It's not there?"

name: Ayana
message: "Mamiya-kun."

name: Takuji
message: "Agh... Blood?"

name: Ayana
message: "Mamiya-kun, that was over the line for a prank. You deserved to get punched for that. Hehehe, your nose is bleeding."

name: Takuji
message: "Agh... Oww!"

name: Ayana
message: "If you want to pull a prank the next time you see me, you should be satisfied with just flicking my forehead."

name: Ayana
message: "Otherwise, I'll break your nose again."

name: Takuji
message: "Y-You..."

name: Ayana
message: "But... maybe there won't be a next time."

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehe... I am Otonashi Ayana. That's what they call me. I am not your Riruru-chan's dregs, and I am not a shadow. I am not one of your delusions."

name: Takuji
message: "Riruru-chan isn't a delusion!"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, that isn't a delusion."

name: Ayana
message: "But that might be how it is. It refuses to recognize itself as a delusion, just like I do, and just like you do."

name: Ayana
message: "I'm not a delusion, and neither are you standing in front of me, but..."

name: Ayana
message: "I am Otonashi Ayana."

name: Ayana
message: "In this setting, I am human."

name: Ayana
message: "But you're not a human anymore."

name: Takuji
message: "O-Of course not. I'm the savior!"

name: Takuji
message: "I'm going to save humanity. There's no way I could be a normal human!"

name: Takuji
message: "And I'm not the property of that pathetic soul called Mamiya Takuji!"

name: Takuji
message: "I'm the person who will return the world to the sky! I am the savior! I am the one who controls the Holy Surge!"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes... you will return it to the sky... That sky is called..."

name: Takuji
message: "The limit of the world. The final sky. End Sky."

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. You will reach the End Sky."

name: Takuji
message: "The infinite and the finite connect. The finite and the infinite connect. A spinning Ouroboros."

name: Takuji
message: "Circulation... eternal recurrence... continuity... eternity... circular motion... death and resurrection... destruction and creation... the base of the universe... the infinite... immortality... perfection... omniscience and omnipotence..."

name: Ayana
message: "Hmm... That sounds complicated."

name: Takuji
message: "The awakening of Jormungandr is at hand! It encircles Midgard. The great sea serpent grasping his own tail will awaken!"

name: Takuji
message: "It is at hand!"

name: Takuji
message: "Therefore, we must return to the sky!"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehehe... That's nice."

name: Ayana
message: "You've found a reason for your existence."

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Takuji
message: "It's not such a simple, vulgar concept as you think."

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehe, of course."

name: Ayana
message: "Minakami Yuki..."

name: Ayana
message: "Yuuki Tomosane..."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What about them?!"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehe."

name: Ayana
message: "Even now, you react to their names. They still bother you."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-Why would I care about them? There's no reason for me to..."

name: Ayana
message: "Those two are living completely different lives than you are, saying completely different things than you are."

name: Ayana
message: "Each one sees different things, does different things, yet those things are the same."

name: Ayana
message: "The three are at the same time both disconnected and unified."

name: Ayana
message: "Creation, Harmony... and Destruction."

name: Ayana
message: "Their natures are completely different, but they're the same."

name: Ayana
message: "One who names it. One who speaks it. One who erases it."

name: Ayana
message: "Yuuki Tomosane-kun... He said..."

name: Takuji
message: "What did he say?"

name: Ayana
message: "A crying..."

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?"

name: Ayana
message: "A crying infant. He couldn't stop it from crying."

name: Ayana
message: "And the fact that he couldn't might be man's original sin, and because of that, its benevolence."

name: Ayana
message: "For a human to live is benevolence in the form of original sin."

name: Ayana
message: "The road to hell is paved with good intentions."

name: Ayana
message: "In that case, the road to hell is made of hope."

name: Takuji
message: "Hope..."

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, to live is to hope."

name: Ayana
message: "You don't need that anymore, since you're trying to do what Yuuki-kun was originally supposed to do."

name: Ayana
message: "The roles of the gods change. The Destroyer becomes the Creator. The Creator becomes the Harmonizer. Each of their roles change."

name: Ayana
message: "The Destroyer has lost his right to destroy, since the Creator is ending everything."

name: Ayana
message: "After rebirth, the god that was supposed to rule over harmony can't do anything. The Creator has given up on being the Rebirther."

name: Ayana
message: "The Creator is trying to destroy the world he created."

name: Ayana
message: "The Destroyer speaks of hope."

name: Ayana
message: "The Creator speaks of despair."

name: Ayana
message: "The Harmonizer hesitates and stops in place."

name: Ayana
message: "Stops and looks at where the world is going."

name: Ayana
message: "Now that the rotation has begun, it can't be stopped."

name: Ayana
message: "The final puzzle for man is the infinite and the finite, rotation and suspension."

name: Takuji
message: "Shut up! Shut up! I'm tired of listening to you!"

name: Takuji
message: "I'm... I'm the person who will reach the End Sky!

name: Takuji
message: "I'll say it again! I'm the person who will reach the End Sky!"

name: Takuji
message: "I'll say it again! I am the herald of the End Sky!"

name: Takuji
message: "I'll say it again! I hate you!"
A quiet voice...
Lucid eyes...
She seemed to know, seemed to see everything.
I hate her...

name: Takuji
message: "I am the forerunner of prophecy, who will reach the complete world."

name: Ayana
message: "Today is already the 18th. There's just a little longer to go until the last sky."

name: Takuji
message: "That's right. The final sky. The last sky. The world's limit is approaching. Soon, soon I'll see the world's limit."

name: Takuji
message: "There's not much time until the 20th. No, I have to end it before then. I have to return everything to the sky. Everything."

name: Takuji
message: "I have to return all the people gathered in the ark."

name: Takuji
message: "The end is right there. The sky's limit is right there. The boundary line... The world's last... The End Sky is right there. That's it... Look."

name: Takuji
message: "Look. It looks so big. It looks so massive."

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, I can see it... I can see it..."

name: Takuji
message: "Beyond the limit... The limit is a door... Yes, a door... And beyond that door is a sea... An incredibly deep sea..."

name: Takuji
message: "That sea is a very beautiful, bright blue... There are power lines connected world to world to world to world to world..."

name: Takuji
message: "The other side of the window is bright and blue... azure... It's blue as far as you can see... and beautiful..."

name: Takuji
message: "Look, that is the world's limit... The final sky..."

name: Ayana
message: "You're right."

name: Takuji
message: "The End Sky has already come this far... There are just a few more inches until we reach the edge of the world..."

name: Takuji
message: "Even now would be fine... I wouldn't mind jumping now. Our hands would reach... Our hands would reach the edge of the world... I could do it right now..."

name: Takuji
message: "I could do it... even now."

name: Ayana
message: "Then why haven't you done it yet?"

name: Takuji
message: "I won't do it yet. I won't do it yet. I won't do yet... Because I still have things to do here?"

name: Takuji
message: "Things I still have to do?"

name: Takuji
message: "Things I still have to do in this world?"

name: Takuji
message: "Still have to do..."
"Mamiya Takuji!"

name: Takuji
message: "Eh? Huh... You are?"

name: Takuji
message: "This voice..."

name: Takuji
message: "This is..."

name: Takuji
message: "You're..."

name: Tomosane
message: "You haven't forgotten about me now that you've become the savior, have you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Mamiya Takuji!"

name: Takuji
message: "Y-Yuuki Tomosane..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's right. I'm Yuuki. The person you so feared... Yuuki Tomosane-sama."

name: Takuji
message: "Have you changed since the last time we met? I thought you were more of a low-life thug..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Actually, I've always been like this."

name: Tomosane
message: "Now then... I've come to make your life hell again... Prepare yourself..."

name: Takuji
message: "Feared? Is that what you came here to say? I didn't expect you to come here, though... You're really out of place."

name: Tomosane
message: "Out of place?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah. Exactly. You're the stupidest, lowest person I know. All you know how to do is talk with your fists, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, you're stupid, so maybe you don't know this, but talking with your fists means using violence."

name: Takuji
message: "In the furthest reaches of the universe, under the End Sky, why would I meet a vulgar man like you?"

name: Takuji
message: "The past times I've come here, I've met White Riruru... the Father Himself... Black Riruru's incarnation Otonashi Ayana... and other metaphysical existences beyond comprehension."

name: Takuji
message: "So then, why are you here?"

name: Takuji
message: "A physical person like you appearing here is so out of place. It's like if Mori no Ishimatsu suddenly appeared in Der Ring des Nibelungen and asked, 'Anyone want sushi?'"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, really? Sorry about that, then. I guess I don't fit in with all your beautiful delusions."

name: Tomosane
message: "But didn't I say it before?"

name: Tomosane
message: "The battle between you and me will go on until one of us is destroyed."

name: Tomosane
message: "Did you think you could end it just by hurting me?"

name: Takuji
message: "More or less."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, really? You've underestimated me, then."

name: Takuji
message: "What are you talking about? You can't act tough now after you've been hiding away from me all this time."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hiding? Are you stupid?"

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You're going to do your stupid salvation thing on the border of the 19th and the 20th, right..."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh... So you wanted to have our final battle under this sky?"

name: Takuji
message: "The sky of the world's end... The decisive battle under that sky... Hehehe, a physical being like you has actually planned a pretty good show."

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... So the savior's brain is still fucked up, huh... What do you mean, a show?"

name: Takuji
message: "What did you say?"

name: Tomosane
message: "If the savior's head is full of flowers... then I guess all the work I've put in is going to pay off..."

name: Takuji
message: "Work?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... That's right. Work, that word you hate."

name: Takuji
message: "What kind of work?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Work... to erase you."

name: Takuji
message: "Huh? Work to erase me?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah. The three principles that you don't understand."

name: Tomosane
message: "Work, courage, and fucking courage!"

name: Takuji
message: "You really are a different character. Were you always such a run of the mill thug? It's kind of off-putting..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I've never been serious until now. I've always hidden my power. But this time, I'm serious. I've seriously come to kill you."

name: Takuji
message: "This might be a silly question, but why do you want to erase me so badly?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hehehehe... Why? That's a stupid question, Mamiya Takuji."

name: Takuji
message: "Stupid? Would I be wrong to say it's because you've been infected by the Black Surge?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Black Surge? I see you've come up with some new delusions. I don't remember you using that word the last time we met."

name: Takuji
message: "Come up with? Are you utterly thoughtless? I didn't come up with it. I learned it. I learned the truth."

name: Tomosane
message: "You believe every single one of your silly delusions, huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Delusions? Hehehe... It must all sound delusional to someone who hasn't even a fragment of knowledge."

name: Tomosane
message: "Delusion, huh? Just like Copernicus' heliocentric theory was called delusional, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "So you do understand."

name: Tomosane
message: "In ancient times, even though Philolaus believed that the Central Fire was at the center of the universe and the earth, the sun, and all other celestial objects rotated around it..."

name: Tomosane
message: "He believed the sky rotated around the earth. Do you know why?"

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's because... he had preconceived notions..."

name: Tomosane
message: "He already had his answer, and he changed reality to fit his notions. His worldview became warped."

name: Tomosane
message: "The center of the world is right here."

name: Tomosane
message: "That was a given... Even if it was mistaken, they couldn't accept that their world revolved around another celestial object..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Preconceived notions... Reality forcibly fit to those notions... Doing that warped their worldviews."

name: Tomosane
message: "The facts that you want to be true coincidentally happen to align with reality. How often does that happen to you, Takuji?"

name: Tomosane
message: "But they still wanted to believe they were they the center of the world and everything revolved around them. They alone were special in the world."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, Takuji... You want to believe that too, don't you? You don't want to accept... the way the world is in reality."

name: Tomosane
message: "You aren't the center of the world, and you aren't special!"

name: Tomosane
message: "And you aren't any sort of savior like your mother thought you were!"

name: Takuji
message: "Yuuki!"
I lost myself in my anger.
An improper action for the savior.
The person recognized by God was overtaken by his emotions...
I tried to punch Yuuki.
I could see the sky above me.
There were clouds of light in the darkness.
Those forms were vividly seared into my eyes... I looked upon the night sky with admiration for an instant... In that instant―

name: Takuji
message: "Gh... Aagh."
I received a blow like none I had ever experienced before...
The world tilted at an impossible angle.

name: Tomosane
message: "How about that? The all-knowing savior should know about that move, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What was that?"
I searched my Savior Brain... That was... No, I know it... So why?
I staggered as I stood up... The savior could never lose to a peasant like this...

name: Tomosane
message: "Work, courage, and fucking courage... Do you know what those are the prerequisites for?"

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What are you talking about..."

name: Tomosane
message: "The prerequisites for a hero..."

name: Takuji
message: "A-Are you stupid..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Though you probably don't need them to be the savior..."

name: Takuji
message: "O-Of course not..."

name: Tomosane
message: "It looks like you're serious, huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Serious...?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's right."
His words don't make any sense.
Serious?
What does he mean?
What is this fool talking about?

name: Tomosane
message: "I thought I was born just to erase you. I denied myself and tried to erase myself."

name: Tomosane
message: "I thought I was created."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I am the Destroyer. An existence born to end things. To destroy worlds with order. An existence that gives birth to new order."

name: Tomosane
message: "I was supposed to be a person created just for that purpose."

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you scared? Can't you admit it?"

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What are you talking about?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What am I talking about?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you stupid? I'm talking about      , of course!"

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What are you talking about?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... Even now... Even at the end, you can't hear it."

name: Tomosane
message: "    name. That's it, isn't it? You tried to protect      by forgetting about      and pretending       was dead."

name: Tomosane
message: "For that at least, I have to commend you. No matter how crazy you got, you always put       's happiness first."

name: Takuji
message: "What's that? What are you saying?"

name: Tomosane
message: "    name won't reach you until the very end, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Whenever the words you hear aren't convenient for you, you distort them or erase them."

name: Tomosane
message: "Especially when it comes to      . You've tried to erase or change all your memories of     ."

name: Tomosane
message: "You've used every technique to erase, replace, or ignore      's existence. That's bravery. That was your own form of bravery."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What is it? You... Why haven't you been saying the most important parts?! Don't hide your words!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You're the one who hid them!"

name: Tomosane
message: "It was you who hid them. But remember that I was the only one with a connection to Hasaki. Neither you nor Minakami Yuki did, but I did, the person who is fated to disappear!"
What is he saying?
What does Minakami Yuki have to do with it? I don't understand what he's talking about at all.

name: Takuji
message: "Are you crazy?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Crazy? Hehehehe... Are you really asking that? Here, in this place... No, in this world, there is not a single person who isn't crazy!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You should know it... The world you've birthed. The world you know. The world you created has nothing but madmen!"
What is he... He was just supposed to be a stepping stone on my path to becoming the savior...
He's nothing more than a hurdle for me to surpass... So what's he doing? What is his reason for existence?
Yuuki's attack.
I saw through it.
I am the person who knows all martial arts and has practiced them to perfection, so... so...
I barely managed to cushion my fall. I only managed to turn my head and disperse the force of the blow.

name: Takuji
message: "Gah... Aah..."

name: Tomosane
message: "How about that? You can't even see straight now, can you?"
How hard did I hit the ground... I don't know... In that moment, I couldn't understand it at all...

name: Tomosane
message: "You haven't learned a single new trick. While you were playing around with your delusions, I was training so hard that I pissed blood so that I would have new techniques."

name: Tomosane
message: "This is the limit of your delusions."

name: Tomosane
message: "Your delusions... will be ended by my reality."

name: Takuji
message: "E-End..."
My head was reeling... I couldn't move properly at all.
I must have suffered a pretty bad concussion...
I... leaned against the fence...

name: Tomosane
message: "This is the opposite of last time..."

name: Tomosane
message: Last time, I was there, leaning against the fence, and you looked down upon me."

name: Tomosane
message: "Now it's the opposite. You're the one who's fallen bloody to the ground... Takuji."

name: Takuji
message: "I've... fallen..."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right. This is the end."

name: Tomosane
message: "Let's end it here... Mamiya Takuji."

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Tomosane
message: "We're under the End Sky, so shouldn't it be fine?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Now that we're right here, beneath that sky you always longed for..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Isn't it a fitting end for us?"

name: Takuji
message: "An end for us?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah. Let's end it here. We don't need to drag anyone else into this."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't drag everyone else into your games. The only ones who need to go along with your end of the world are me and her. The three of us are plenty."

name: Tomosane
message: "This sky is the end for just you and me."

name: Tomosane
message: "This is where it will end."

name: Tomosane
message: "Isn't that good enough... Takuji?"
What's with him...
Why does his expression look like that...
That face... It's just like... It's just like...
Something glinted in Yuuki's hand... A blade...
A blade that could easily kill a human...
So he wants to kill me with that...
Is this an attack by the Black Surge?
He's part of the Black Surge...

name: Tomosane
message: "It won't hurt. I'll aim for the heart."

name: Tomosane
message: "Aren't we both tired of this painful game?"
Yuuki changed to an underhand grip on the knife.
To plunge it into my chest...
Am I going to die here?
Is it going to end with me being killed by this commoner?
Is that my end?
Am I fine with that end?!
If it ended here, this would be a kusoge!!
"You can't! You can't do that!"
Someone's voice...
I remember this voice... This voice is...

name: Tsukasa
message: "Y-You can't... Yuuki-kun, you can't do that..."

name: Kagami
message: "Tsukasa..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why did you follow me?"

name: Kagami
message: "If you had locked the door behind you, Tsukasa wouldn't have been able to follow you."

name: Tomosane
message: "So I forgot to lock the door..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You can't... Yuuki-kun, I, I won't let you do that!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "If that's what you were planning to do... I should've tied you up and never let you leave."

name: Tomosane
message: "I told you, that was also an option."
What?
What are they talking about?
They're...?
No... This is the miracle...
This is why I'm the savior...
As proof, every time I'm in a hopeless situation, it instantly changes for the better.
First... my supernatural healing powers...
My injuries from Yuuki healed instantly.
With the power of the savior, I healed my body...
Then finally...
The knife he's holding...
That knife...
That's not something he should have...
That knife...
That's right... He's not the one holding the knife...
I'M THE ONE HOLDING THE KNIFE.

name: Takuji
message: "Yuuki!"
The knife disappeared from Yuuki's hand.
The same knife appeared in my hand... then I...

name: Takuji
message: "Your heart is right here. It's right here, isn't it?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yuuki-kun!"

name: Kagami
message: "Mamiya, you little!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I messed up... huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Messed up? What are you talking about? This was inevitable. This is pre-established harmony."

name: Tomosane
message: "Pre-established... harmony, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I see. So my role is over."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, that's right. You were just a hurdle for me on my path to becoming the savior."

name: Takuji
message: "An existence for me to surpass... It's true, I underestimated you. I underestimated you too much. I have to thank you for teaching me that."

name: Takuji
message: "The savior should never let his guard down. No matter how insignificant his opponent seems, he should never let his guard down."

name: Takuji
message: "You've taught me that... Thank you."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey,      ... I'm sorry..."

name: Tomosane
message: "It looks like... this is the end for me..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... I couldn't do anything for you,       ... could I..."

name: Tomosane
message: "There's nothing I can do... I've been beaten..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Nothing I can do... huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Is this too reality?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Then I have to accept it..."

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, accept it. This is reality."

name: Takuji
message: "I am the savior, and I will return the world to the sky. That is the reality."

name: Tomosane
message: "I see... Good job, then..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... If this is how it was going to end, I shouldn't have used the last of my time like this..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I should've spent my time with you..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hahahaha... I guess I'm... an awful brother too..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I haven't changed at all..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Now then... Farewell, Mamiya Takuji. Congratulations. You've won."

name: Tomosane
message: "And... I've lost..."
Yuuki whispered something in a low voice... as he died... What was he looking at?
A pitiful man...

name: Takuji
message: "I'm tired... after that..."
I started walking... to go home...

name: Takuji
message: "To the ark..."

name: Takuji
message: "Agh... Wh-What is this..."
Searing pain... More pain than I've ever felt in my life... What is this?
My shirt was covered in blood... I thought it was all from when I stabbed him.
But... the stain of blood steadily expanded.
